---
title: "Honey Analysis"
author: "Calvin Fertig III"
date: "2026-01-26"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r}
library(car)
df <- read.csv("honey_bee_state.csv")
df$Avo <- ifelse(df$State == "CALIFORNIA", "Yes", "No")
```

```{r}
head(df)
```

```{r}
table(df$State, df$Year)
```




```{r}
test<- lm(HpH ~ DISEASE
          * OTHER 
          * PESTICIDES 
          *PESTS
          #+UNKNOWN 
          *VARROAMITES
          *TemperatureC
          *Percipitation.Inches,
          data = df)

#summary(test)
```


```{r}
anova(test)
```


```{r}
Anova(test)
```
